headline: No Going Back' – Moody's Economist Mark Zandi Warns 'Outright Job Losses' Incoming Due to AI After Block's 4K Job Cuts
summary: Artificial intelligence taking over human jobs is no longer just a fictional idea or exaggerated fear — it is quickly turning into a reality unfolding before our eyes. AI-related layoffs are likely to increase in the coming days and push the labor market to a point of no return, Moody's Analytics Chief Economist Mark Zandi said in a post on X about recent layoffs at Block Inc. (NYSE:XYZ). Zandi said Block's messaging suggests AI was a key reason behind the layoffs. Don't Miss: A single bad hire
